summary: Completed comprehensive testing of English Teachers Planner application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Application successfully generates MEDUCA-aligned lesson planners with theme planners and 5 skill-based lessons.
passed_tests: Scenarios load for each grade (8 scenarios per grade)
Preview page displays theme planner and 5 lesson planners
All 5 skills covered (Listening, Reading, Speaking, Writing, Mediation)
Design follows institutional teal/blue color scheme
All backend APIs return correct status codes
